violations.text: Splash guard required at handsinks at pizza station and by 3 bay sink. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
Floor in warewashing area was observed with a crack. The physical facilities to be in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/17/2026

The coating on the floor in the kitchen area was observed in poor repair. Pitting and build-up of residue was observed during time of inspection. The materials for indoor floors must be durable, easily cleanable and nonabsorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2026

Thresholds at walk-in cooler and walk-in freezer doors were observed unfinished and/or in poor repair. The physical facilities to be in good repair and proper adjustment. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/01/2026
Splash guard required at handsinks at pizza station and by 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
